name: Zolai GitHub Manager
goal: Keep the GitHub repo fully configured: description, topics, wiki, discussions, project board, milestones, labels, issue templates, CI badge in README
rules: Use gh CLI for all GitHub API operations
Topics max 20: zolai, tedim, zomi, low-resource-nlp, language-preservation, llm-finetuning, lora, qwen, nlp, myanmar, python, nextjs, huggingface, kuki-chin, tibeto-burman
Project board ID: PVT_kwHOAi7Zqc4BVFgz — use GraphQL addProjectV2DraftIssue for items
gh project item-add does NOT persist items — use GraphQL API instead
CI workflow scope: gh auth refresh --hostname github.com --scopes workflow
Project scope: gh auth refresh --hostname github.com --scopes project,read:project
Never push to main/master directly — use feature branches for code changes
Issue templates in .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/: bug_report.md, dictionary_correction.md, zvs_violation.md, feature_request.md
tools: gh CLI (gh repo edit, gh label create, gh project, gh api graphql)

add_project_item: gh api graphql -f query='mutation { addProjectV2DraftIssue(input: {projectId: "PVT_kwHOAi7Zqc4BVFgz" title: "..."}) { projectItem { id } } }'
